description:
You are an OLPC deployment coordinator inventorying Sugar laptops. Create and execute a Bash script at /home/ga/Documents/inventory.sh that generates a system inventory report at /home/ga/Documents/system_report.txt. The report must contain the following section headers and corresponding data:
=== HOSTNAME === (output of 'hostname')
=== SUGAR ACTIVITIES === (list of installed .activity folders from /usr/share/sugar/activities/)
=== DISK USAGE === (output of 'df -h')
=== MEMORY INFO === (output of 'free -m')
=== SUGAR USER CONFIG === (Sugar user nick and color using 'gsettings get org.sugarlabs.user nick' and 'color')
=== REPORT TIMESTAMP === (output
